evidence.snippet:
Excellence in Lead-Acid Battery Manufacturing Since 1977
A Tradition of Excellence
Recognized and respected for over forty years of advanced battery design, Concorde Battery Corporation steadily built the reputation for engineering and crafting THE premium Recombinant Gas (RG®) lead acid aviation battery. Founded on a tradition of excellence, Concorde’s Platinum Series® sealed lead acid batteries are universally recognized.

Concorde® Battery Corporation manufactures premium quality valve regulated sealed lead-acid batteries (VRSLA) for aircraft, marine, medical, telecommunications, emergency backup, and renewable energy applications.

items.notes: Manufactures valve-regulated sealed lead-acid (VRSLA) batteries under the Platinum Series® / RG® brand for aviation including military applications.

tagline: Manufactures sealed recombinant-gas lead-acid aviation batteries (Platinum Series®) for business, general, and military aircraft, plus emergency backup applications. Primary market is certified OEM installations and aftermarket upgrades for manned platforms (Phenom, Gulfstream, Air Tractor). Public evidence of unmanned-systems applicability is absent; NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown. No named UAS programs or contracts identified in available data.
